creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
This problem is still present on CURRENT (14.0-CURRENT #11 main-n263897-f85b82daf1d6: Sat Jul  1 09:40:06 CEST 2023  amd64).

After the upgrade of CURRENT towards LLVM16, almost every ports has been recompiled and especially devel/xtensa-esp32-elf has been recompiled using portmaster -df to ensure every dependency is up to date.
